stemHtml: Which one of the following statements is correct concerning the appearance of great circles, with the exception of meridians, on a Polar Stereographic chart?

options.a: Any straight line is a great circle.
options.b: They are curves convex to the Pole.
options.c: The higher the latitude, the closer they approximate to a straight line.
options.d: They are complex curves that can be convex and/or concave to the Pole.
